name: @omne/omne
description: OmneAgent Node launcher (thin wrapper around Rust binaries).

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/omne.js && node --check ./lib/launcher.js && node --check ./scripts/postinstall-toolchain.mjs && node --check ./scripts/assemble-vendor.mjs && node --check ./scripts/build-vendor-bundle.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-vendor-bundle.mjs && node --check ./scripts/update-release-index.mjs && node --check ./scripts/release-vendor-bundle.mjs && node --check ./scripts/release-host-vendor-bundle.mjs && node --check ./scripts/release-local-vendor-bundle.mjs && node --check ./scripts/release-matrix-vendor-bundle.mjs && node --check ./scripts/validate-tag-release-artifacts.mjs && node --check ./scripts/package-tag-release-assets.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-tag-release-tarballs.mjs
